articles.title: How Polygon Is Making A Difference In The Fight Against Climate Change
articles.description: The recent announcement that Polygon’s MATIC network has become carbon neutral may give its native token the momentum to keep climbing. Since the beginning of 2022, MATIC, the native token, has been having difficulties. Since reaching an all-time high of $2.92 last year on Dec 27, its value has decreased by about 86.09%. articles.title: Canadian regulator takes enforcement actions against Bybit and KuCoin
articles.description: “Bybit responded to the OSC’s enforcement action, maintained an open dialogue, provided requested information, and committed to engaging in registration discussions,” said the OSC.

articles.title: Decentralized Exchange dYdX To Build Its Own Blockchain
articles.description: The expansion is part of the exchange’s plan to be fully decentralized by the end of 2022

articles.title: Stablecoin Tether (USDT) To Undergo Full Audit From Top Firm in Bid for Transparency
articles.description: Tether (USDT) will undergo a full audit from a top accounting firm, according to the stablecoin issuer’s chief technology officer. Tether CTO Paolo Ardoino tells Euromoney that a top-12 accounting firm will audit the company because the leading four auditing companies are wary of stepping into the relatively unregulated crypto space. “I think it’s one […] The post Stablecoin Tether (USDT) To Undergo Full Audit From Top Firm in Bid for Transparency appeared first on The Daily Hodl.

articles.title: Voyager Digital: Exposure to 3AC Consists of 15,250 BTC and $350 Million USDC
articles.description: On Wednesday (June 22), Voyager Digital Ltd. (TSX: VOYG), the owner of crypto trading platform Voyager Digital, announced that its operating subsidiary Voyager Digital, LLC “may issue a notice of default to Three Arrows Capital (‘3AC’) for failure to repay its loan.” According to Voyager’s press release: Voyager’s 3AC exposure is 15,250 bitcoins and 350 […]

articles.title: dYdX moves to Cosmos-based blockchain for v4 to optimize decentralization and trading flow
articles.description: The protocol chose Cosmos as the best fit as it would not only need decentralization but also the ability to handle and scale 1,000 orders per second.

articles.title: SEC commissioner criticizes crypto bailouts as ECB president calls for staking regulations
articles.description: United States SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce criticized crypto bailouts in a recent Forbes interview and said the current market crash could set the foundation for a more sustainable future for the industry.

articles.title: Bitcoin Steady Above $20K After Drop To $17K – A Slow Climb To Green?
articles.description: After a weekend in which Bitcoin (BTC) experienced realized losses to the tune of $7.3 billion, the largest cryptocurrency has erased all weekend losses and is up over 8 percent to $21,206 in the last 24 hours. Bitcoin has risen almost 22 percent since Saturday’s low of $17,592, and is currently trading around $21,000. The BTC price increased more than 4 percent to $20,882, Coin Metrics data...

articles.description: The move reduces the utilization of USDC within the Solend platform and allows users to withdraw their assets once more.

articles.title: Crypto influencers allegedly weaponize conspiracies to fleece QAnon followers
articles.description: Mixing conspiracy theories, a distrust for traditional institutions and hopium in crypto, two influencers are alleged to have made millions using pump-and-dump schemes.

articles.title: USDC’s ‘real volume’ flips Tether on Ethereum as total supply hits 55.9B
articles.description: At least on the Ethereum network, USDC real volume has nearly doubled that of USDT in the past 24 hours which could be another sign that the top stablecoin's dominance is coming to an end.

articles.title: Polygon Claims They Have Achieved Carbon Neutrality
articles.description: Polygon claims to be squeaky green: In a collab with KlimaDAO, the Polygon ecosystem has retired $400,000 in carbon credits.
